text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Up on stage, the winner of today's<n>race is
holding a concert to celebrate.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Hey, everyoooone! Thanks for all<n>your support!
I'll definitely see you<n>here again next time!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Smart Falcon's concert ends in an<n>eruption of
applause.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Now that the concert is over, I figure I<n>should
head back to the academy,<n>but...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Ryan! Thanks for waiting! Sorry for<n>being late. I
had to clean up.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Great performance today! You came<n>just in time.
The next bus is the last<n>one back to school.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
But anyways, your concert was a<n>massive
success!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, but I wish that last dance move<n>had gone a
bit better.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Really? Hmm, wait. Falco, look behind<n>you...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Smart Falcon looks back and sees a<n>young
Umamusume facing her.

text_block_list.name: Young Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
Um, hi, Falco! I was in the front row at<n>your
concert! You were so pretty and<n>cute and
sparkly! It was amazing!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Aww, you were watching?! I'm so<n>happy!

text_block_list.name: Young Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
Even though I'm an Umamusume,<n>I'm really
slow. I got really depressed<n>and thought I was no
good.

text_block_list.name: Young Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
But watching your concert made me<n>feel good
again! I want to race again!<n>And I wanna dance
like you, Falco!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Oh! I see... You're just like...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Hehe... I see, I see! Well, isn't that a<n>beautiful
dream!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
I know! How would you like to have a<n>dance
lesson with me right now?

text_block_list.name: Young Umamusume
text_block_list.text: Really?! Yes, please!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Smart Falcon teaches the little girl<n>some simple
dance moves.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
See you later! I'm sure we'll both be<n>dancing on
stage together one day! ☆

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Beaming with satisfaction, the young<n>fan leaves
with her parents.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: Smart Falcon is overjoyed.<n>However...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Oh crap! Sorry, Ryan. We missed the<n>last bus
home, didn't we?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha, no worries! It's just a<n>two-hour run
back. It'll make for some<n>fine exercise!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Besides, who could blame you after<n>seeing that
girl's smile?

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Ryan... Hehe, thanks a lot.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
I want to see all my fans' sparkling<n>dreams
come true! That's the path I<n>lead! ♪

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
It's incredible how much your<n>concerts touch
people's hearts! I<n>really admire how you do that!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Y-you admire me?! Wait, does that<n>mean you
want to be an Umadol?!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Then do it! Let's be Umadols<n>together!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Uh, no... that's not... quite what I<n>meant...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
You have a well-built physique and a<n>natural
smile!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: That's all you need. You'd be great!<n>☆

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
How about we shine together?! We<n>can be a
unit!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: ...Oh, would you look at the time?!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Hey, wait up!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Ryaaaaan!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
I know that look! That determination!<n>That
passion! It's just like me and<n>weightlifting!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: ...Huh? Weight...lifting?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Weightlifting requires an unyielding<n>spirit and
unrelenting perseverance!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
And you have both! Yes, I knew from<n>the start I
could sense a fellow spirit!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Well? You wanna train with me?!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Um, well, I, uh... I think my muscles<n>are pretty
sore today, so...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
They're sore! That means they're<n>getting bigger!
It's proof of your<n>progress!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Soreness equals progress! It's our<n>chance!
Forget tomorrow, let's do it<n>today! No! Let's do it
now!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: P-please, noooo!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Oh, you're already doing some leg<n>exercises?!
All right! I can't slack off<n>either!
